MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-13-2020 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LISA MACKEY, MASOUMEH PAHLBOD, SAN FRANCISCO REAL ESTATE HOLDINGS, INC.'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant to CCP 877.6.

Grant. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

The Court will sign the proposed order included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
